meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Solving Project Stagnation with User Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stuck without project ideas? Master advanced user onboarding patterns using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-converting SaaS experiences today.
content.answer_block: When inspiration hits a wall, pivot to building high-value user onboarding flows. By mastering the 'first-run experience' (FRE), you solve a universal SaaS problem. Use Antigravity to scaffold the architecture and Claude Code to iterate on UX patterns, turning a blank slate into a repeatable, high-ticket freelance product.
content.intro:
The blank editor is a freelancer’s silent enemy. You have the technical stack, but the project idea—the 'killer app'—remains elusive, leaving you stuck in a loop of endless tutorials and zero billable output. The stagnation isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of focus on the one feature every client is desperate for: a frictionless path to value.

User onboarding is the bridge between a visitor and a loyal subscriber. By specializing in high-conversion onboarding, you stop chasing 'ideas' and start solving a fundamental business bottleneck. This guide leverages the raw velocity of Antigravity and the intelligence of Claude Code to transform your workflow into a project-generating machine.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Onboarding Blueprint
steps.description: Map out the 'Aha!' moment for your user. Before coding, define the shortest path between sign-up and the primary value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular React component structure for a 3-step progressive onboarding wizard that includes state persistence using Zustand.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a directory structure for an onboarding flow with separate components for Welcome, Tutorial, and Setup.'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Tooltips
steps.description: Use intelligent tooltips to guide users through complex UI without overwhelming them. Focus on progressive disclosure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component that anchors to arbitrary DOM elements based on a data-attribute, including entrance animations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add a custom hook useOnboardingTour to manage tooltip visibility state across the app.'

steps.title: Integrate Interactive Progress Tracking
steps.description: Gamify the setup process to increase completion rates by showing users how close they are to finishing their configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive linear progress bar component that calculates completion percentage based on a boolean array of onboarding steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Update the state management to sync progress bar completion with user profile fields.'

steps.title: Automate Data Collection & Validation
steps.description: Ensure user inputs during onboarding are validated in real-time to prevent friction later in the user journey.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Zod schemas for onboarding form validation and integrate them with React Hook Form for seamless error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement Zod schema validation for the user onboarding form and display error messages inline.'

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy the Onboarding Engine
steps.description: Connect the onboarding flow to your backend/database to ensure user progress is saved and the onboarding is marked as complete.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Supabase/Firebase integration function to update a 'has_completed_onboarding' flag upon successful form submission.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Connect the final onboarding step to the database to persist the completion state.'

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a decoupled micro-frontend; it makes it easier to sell as a standalone service to clients.
Use 'Empty States' as your primary onboarding trigger—never show a blank dashboard to a new user.
Implement 'Skippability' from day one; high-intent users will hate being forced through a tutorial.
Measure onboarding drop-off points with analytics events; treat every step as a conversion funnel.
Use mock data injection during development so you can test the full onboarding flow without manually filling forms 50 times.
content.next_steps: Package your new onboarding engine into a reusable boilerplate and pitch it to your next three clients as a 'Conversion Optimization' add-on.
content.conversion_block: Stop building features nobody uses and start building systems that drive revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
